Description: Classify one deterministic representative image per cluster using OpenAI and apply the returned category to the whole cluster.

Stories.StoryName: Build structured categorization prompt and schema
Stories.StoryDescription: Create a prompt and strict JSON schema that force one category choice from the configured taxonomy and request a short rationale.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Prompt and schema generation are deterministic and covered by automated tests.

Stories.StoryDescription: Send one representative image per cluster to OpenAI using the Responses API and parse the structured category result.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: A mockable categorizer abstraction exists and the default implementation can classify one cluster representative image.

Stories.StoryDescription: Ensure categorization candidates come only from accepted cluster-manifest members and never from `rejected` or `not_photo` folders.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Automated tests verify rejected and non-photo files are not sent to AI and are not considered for categorization.
